arguments.argument:
event_inherited() setCollisionBounds(-4,-1,4,1)
damageType="PIERCE" weaponTag=31 atkLv=global.stBelmont_Dagger[0] atkPower=65+(global.stBelmont_Dagger[0]*2)+global.skillTree[12] atkPower=weaponDmgMod(1,atkPower) global.recAtkNum+=1 global.stBelmont_Dagger[2]+=1 stunTime=7
if oPlayer1.image_xscale=1 x+=10 else { image_xscale=-1 x-=10 direction=180 }
bCollide=0 //bulletSpeed=15 lifeTime=45 lingerFrame=0
